MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2022 ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON FEB-07-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 220, JUDGE KATHLEEN A KELLY. TED WACKER, ESQ. APPEARING VIA COURTCALL FOR PLAINTIFF. DAVID BURNETT, ESQ. APPEARING IN PERSON FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT SETS ORDERS TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. TED WACKER AND ATTY. DAVID BURNETT FOR MAR-25-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. COUNSEL MAY FILE A DECLARATION, OR IF SANCTIONS PAID BY 03/24/21 THEN THE COURT WILL VACATE THE OSC DATE. SANCTIONS MAY BE PAID VIA E-FILING. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT DEPT. 220 BY 4:00PM TODAY VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED AT TRIAL CALL FOR TRIAL SCHEDULING AND THE DEPARTMENT'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED. JUDGE: SAMUEL K.
